ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office on vacation from 15th to 20th July. I will return on 21st July and will respond to your message then. If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague Sarah at sarah@example.com.

Best regards,
John

spam.subject: [Action Required] Zoom Meeting Invite – Please Confirm
spam.body:
Hello,

You have been invited to a confidential Zoom meeting titled "Quarterly Strategy Review" scheduled for 3:00 PM GMT on 28th September. Please confirm your attendance by clicking the link below to accept the invitation and add the event to your calendar.

<URL>

If you do not confirm within 24 hours, the meeting will be automatically rescheduled.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Zoom Support Team
